name: 1-800-FLOWERS.COM A DL-01
summary: 1-800-FLOWERS.COM, Inc. is a floral and gourmet foods gift retailer and e-commerce provider. The company offers a wide variety of floral arrangements, plants, gifts, and gourmet food items through its websites and retail locations. 1-800-FLOWERS.COM is headquartered in Carle Place, New York.
